1. Test Case ID: WIkbQk

- API rejected schema-compliant request

    Valid data should have been accepted
    Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
    Hint: The request body contains 2 additional properties not defined in the schema (`񯞩~`, `×󶃈򐨄¤ßÿ򧨑󗐧񼻣 `). The server likely rejects unexpected fields. Add `additionalProperties: false` to your schema to prevent this.

[400] Bad Request:

    `{"error":"name must contain at least one alphanumeric character"}`

Reproduce with:

    curl -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"hex": "#000000", "\u00d7\udb98\udcc8\uda02\ude04\u00a4\u00df\u0082\u00ff\uda5e\ude11\udb1d\udc27\ud9b3\udee3 ": {"k@": true, "": {"\u0094": -4623673593720672.0, "\uda10\udf3c\u0082": -10235, "\u00fa\u00aa": "\u00a7\u00e9\u001b\u00ae\u00c7\u00b6`L'"'"'.\u00f2"}, "J\u00b0|\u00b7": "\u00f0\u0098et8\u00f4A5\u00fb\u00a4u"}, "\u0080\ud97d\udfa9~\u0003\u009e": ["9\u008d\u8fa3]", null], "name": " "}' http://127.0.0.1:5001/api/colors/0
